name: gb300_nvl72
_comment: GB300 NVL72: Blackwell Ultra, 288 GB HBM3E @ 12 TB/s, FP16 dense 2500 TFLOPS/GPU per framework convention (peak_flops_TF = FP16 dense per chip; FP8 = 5000, FP4 = 10000 by linear byte scaling — these are the source-spec aggregate numbers though Blackwell Ultra published FP4 dense is closer to 15 PF, so the FP16-baseline form here understates B300 FP4 by ~33%; conservative), NVLink5 1.8 TB/s bidir (900 GB/s single-direction). All 72 GPUs in single NVLink domain via 9 NVSwitch Gen3 chips (64.8 TB/s single-dir system aggregate).
